author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Dune: Awakening - Console Announcement Story Trailer
Dune: Awakening, the Open World Survival game set in one of science fiction's most iconic universes, is coming to XBOX Series X|S, XBOX on PC and XBOX Game Pass on September 22nd. Featuring a brand new single-player mode, a new chapter in its cinematic storyline, and many more additions and improvements, this is the definitive version of the game. Arrakis doesn't wait. Neither should you. 

Pre-order now.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/dune-awakening/9pj6fv3130qz

#DuneAwakening #Dune #XBOX #ComingSoon #SurvivalGame #OpenWorld

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE | Release Date Trailer
That’s where the Wings of Theve comes in… the legendary savior. 

ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE releases October 2nd, 2026!
Pre-order now to unlock the F-14A aircraft and exclusive access to ACE COMBAT 0: The Belkan War: Standard Edition Pre-Order - https://www.xbox.com/games/store/game/9MWJ5CX0WBBR
Deluxe Edition Pre-Order - https://www.xbox.com/games/store/game/9NQCCNW8HDGC

The Deluxe Edition of ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE includes:
• Base Game
• 3 days of Early Access
• Customizable Cosmetic Set
• Premium Ace Pass Plus Voucher 

Take to the skies in style with the Joker Flight Pack, including all content from the Deluxe Edition, plus an Official 200-page Artbook, 2 LP Vinyl Records, Slipcase, and Slipmat!

#ACECOMBAT8 #WingsOfTheve

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Fallout 76: Infestations - Gameplay Trailer - Available Now
Play the latest free update today – Infestations! 

Explore, quest, build, craft, and fight across a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Appalachia’s familiar places can host some unfriendly faces with Infestations. Rediscover “infested” areas across the map teeming with high-level foes and high-level loot, including new 4-Star Legendary weapons and armor mods!

https://www.xbox.com/games/fallout-76
